Short CV

Özgül Öztürk graduated from Anadolu University, Fine Arts Faculty, Department of Cartoon and Animation in 2010. She graduated from the Animation department as the top-ranked student and was invited to Anima Istanbul as an intern student in the same year. Between 2010 and 2017, she worked in different animation studios as a character animator, director, lead animator, and supervisor in various projects such as “Harika İşler Takımı”, “Köstebekgiller”, “Kimin Tarlası”, “Kelilie ve Dimne”, “Biz İkimiz”, “Ciciki”, “Canım Kardeşim”, “Doru”, and “Ahtopi”. She graduated from Istanbul University, Faculty of Communication, Radio, Television and Cinema master's program in 2021 and is still continuing her doctorate in the same department. Özgül Öztürk has competence in areas such as character Animation, Cartoon Techniques, Cartoon Basic Design, Character and Environment Design, 3D Modeling, and Experimental Animation.
